title: Ryan Meyer
content: Mechanical Engineering Co-op working under Ali in Operations located in Feynman TO DO Task Related Project Person Notes Reach out to Nikki and Alex again re: mixers scope Mixer Chuck Nikki, Alex Meet Brian to go over drawing notes, then rename/move files and fill ePDM info cards Mixer Chuck Brian Brian has notes, meeting today or next couple days Finish SolidWorks drawings for Brian's parts Brian One done, one remaining (simple backing plate) Fix 96 well bracket model and recut 96 Well Bracket Zack Bad original measurements, new ones taken; Z-axis clearance issue for metal tabs also needs fixing Make model for finishing panel Pauls Finishing Panel Paul Measurements taken, model not started yet Redesign models with rabbet joint, update drawings, machine and test fit Gel Electrophoresis Tray Rabbet joint will make epoxy cleaner and stronger — update Solidworks models first Schedule disassembly with Jake (and possibly Alex) for X5P33 and EV5L25M re-inspection Mixer Chuck Jake, Alex Jake back Wed Apr 23 — X5P33 needs two people, EV5L25M needs re-inspection to confirm Style C Determine next steps for MA3 Pusher after successful reprint MA3 Pusher Redesign Model fixed, reprinted, fit well — moving forward in process Get part number for filter adapter Filter Connection Get bottle alignment CoC and drawings Label Arm Waiting on Paul — low priority for him, will be a while Projects Base List Table 0 resultsNo resultsHigh Priority Mixer Chuck (TIMELINE IS HIGH PRIORITY) STATUS: IVD chuck style confirmed (Style C). X5P33 BTC and EV5L25M still unknown — needs disassembly with Jake (back Wed Apr 23). Brian has drawing notes, meeting soon. Shop request on hold until styles confirmed and Claire looped in 96 Well Bracket STATUS: Test fit failed — bad measurements and Z-axis clearance issue with metal tabs. New measurements taken, model needs fixing, recut on Zund and retest with Zack Paul's Finishing Panel STATUS: Measurements taken, need to make a model Gel Electrophoresis Tray STATUS: Redesign models with rabbet joint, update drawings, machine and test fit Low Priority MA3 Pusher Redesign STATUS: Model fixed, reprinted, fit well — determine next steps Label Arm STATUS: Waiting on Paul — low priority for him, will be a while - Do drawings and parts process Waiting on something Metrology fixture STATUS: Meeting with Metrology Wed Apr 22 — prep in progress Mixer Chuck (shop request) STATUS: On hold — chuck styles not yet fully confirmed, Claire needs update Filter Connection STATUS: Machined part expected mid-June Future Finished Chair Piece KPA Cutting Boards Septa Mat Excel Falling Vial Bin MicroVu Jig Subsection Hub Software
